semantic.role: Unit test suite for the resume-aware services module, verifying that interrupted sync campaigns are re-fed into scan and forced-sync paths, and that the sync pipeline correctly orchestrates scanner, aggregator, and state persistence.
responsibilities: Validates that interrupted sync candidates are correctly channeled into the scan and forced-sync paths on resume.
Ensures the sync pipeline passes through the scanner and aggregator in the correct order.
Verifies that sync results are persisted via manifest save and usage recording.
outOfScope: Actual implementation of SyncService, CheckService, or scanner logic.
Production behavior not exercised by these test cases.
Integration with real file systems or external services.
invariants: Test file must end with .test.ts or .spec.ts (rule 'test-file-suffix').
All mock setup and teardown must occur within beforeEach.
Test isolation must be maintained via vi.resetModules and vi.restoreAllMocks.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: This file forms part of the test suite that validates the resume behaviour of the sync pipeline, ensuring fault tolerance and data consistency after interruptions.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: No recent change intent inferred from available git metadata or code – the single-line commit message 'e9cba38 2' lacks semantic detail.
